title: fumaria prehensilis
intro: Fumaria prehensilis, also known as climbing fumitory or creeping fumitory, is a type of annual or biennial flowering plant that belongs to the fumitory family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant has been reported to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and acting as an expectorant to relieve respiratory problems. Fumaria prehensilis can be prepared as a tincture, tea, or infusion, and has also been used in traditional remedies in the form of ointments and salves.
